description: NULL mutant — inserts an extra space in a whitespace-insensitive location. Behaviourally identical; both the legacy spec and the v2 journey MUST still pass. Guards against a broken harness that reports false kills (e.g. a build failure counted as 'caught').

Plan-tab DAG never marks a node archived — data-archived stays 'false' and the archived pill/dashed border never render. The journey's archived-child assertions (data-archived="true", plan-node-archived-pill) must fail. Legacy home is the dedicated archived-children spec (the gate-status spec only reads the attribute on live nodes, never asserts ="true").

Plan node always emits an empty data-plan-gate-status attribute regardless of the resolved child's gate progress. The journey's route-injected gateStatus:failed assertion (toHaveAttribute data-plan-gate-status failed) must fail.

The no-workflows warning banner never renders and the Create-Goal button is never disabled for a project with zero workflows. The journey's empty-workflows-route assertions (banner visible + Create button disabled) must fail.
The goal-proposal 'Streaming…' badge never renders during a streaming proposal. The journey's 'streaming badge visible during STAY_BUSY stream' assertion must fail.

The goal-proposal submit button is no longer disabled while a proposal is streaming (drops the !!config.streaming guard). The journey's 'submit disabled while streaming then enables' assertion must fail.
Proposal panel tabs never show the unread/active dot (goal-tab-dot). The journey's 'role proposal tab appears with dot' assertion (.goal-tab-dot visible) must fail.
hasUnseenActivity never reports unseen activity, so the sidebar unread dot (.unseen-dot) never renders for a fresh session. The journey's 'fresh session has unseen dot' assertion (count 1) must fail.

search: const pending = dashboardPendingMutations.filter(m => m.expiresAt === undefined || m.expiresAt > now);
replace: const pending = dashboardPendingMutations.filter(m => m.expiresAt === undefined || m.expiresAt < now);
description: Non-expired pending plan mutations are treated as expired and filtered out, so the pending-mutation card never renders. The journey's 'pending mutation card renders from route-mocked endpoint' assertion must fail.

The goal-status-widget render guard is inverted — the pill renders NOTHING whenever a goalId is present (i.e. always hidden on a team-lead session). The journey's 'goal-status-widget pill visible on team-lead session' assertion must fail.

The multi-agent delegate card header count is off by one ('Delegated to 3 agents' for 2 delegates). The journey's 'TEAM_DELEGATE_CARD_PARALLEL renders multi-agent card' assertion (getByText 'Delegated to 2 agents') must fail.

Every live GOAL matches any search query (includes('') always true), so the sidebar search never hides non-matching goals. Legacy search-e2e SR-01 asserts a non-matching goal title is hidden after search; the v2 sidebar-nav journey only exercises SESSION-title search (never goal-title), so this is expected to expose a real journey gap: goal-title sidebar search is uncovered by the consolidated journey.

The Fork action is never visible in the sidebar-actions popover. The journey's 'sidebar actions popover contains expected action items' assertion (fork action visible) must fail. Legacy home is session-actions.spec.ts (sidebar-actions-menu.spec.ts's fork test is test.skip'd as fixture-covered).
The message composer never restores a persisted prompt draft on session (re)bind. The journey's draft-persistence-across-reload assertion (textarea value contains the drafted text) must fail.
The directory-browser confirm button is relabelled 'Choose current'. The project-onboarding journey selects the button by hasText 'Select current'; the enable/click assertions must fail.
The directory-browser overlay loses its add-project-browse-dialog testid. The project-onboarding journey's 'Browse button opens add-project-browse-dialog overlay' assertion must fail.
The directory-browser 'Up' button loses its add-project-browse-up testid. The project-onboarding journey's 'Browse modal shows directory entries and Up button' assertion must fail.

document.title drops the ' · Bobbit' suffix. Legacy page-title.spec.ts asserts document.title matches /.+ · Bobbit$/; the app-smoke journey only checks the title is non-empty (GAP) — expected real hole.

The API error modal's message element loses its error-details-message testid. Legacy api-error-modal.spec.ts asserts the server error surfaces in error-details-message; the misc journey does not exercise the error modal (GAP) — expected real hole.

The cost popover's cache-hit row loses its cost-cache-hit testid. Legacy cost-popover-cache-hit.spec.ts asserts the cache-hit % renders; the misc journey only best-effort checks a cost element (GAP) — expected real hole.

The workflow-checklist gate-signal-badge count is off by one ('2 signals' for 1 signal). Legacy goal-dashboard-fanout.spec.ts asserts the '1 signal' badge after a gate signal; the team-operations journey stops at the 201 and never asserts the badge (GAP) — expected real hole.

The goal-status pill always reports data-awaiting-signoffs="true". Legacy goal-status-widget.spec.ts asserts it is 'false' with no pending sign-offs; the team-operations journey only checks the pill is visible (GAP) — expected real hole.

The proposal tool card's Open button loses its proposal-open-button testid. Legacy proposal-tools.spec.ts asserts the Open button on the tool card; the proposals journey does not drive the tool-card Open flow (GAP) — expected real hole.

search: slash-menu at-menu border-b border-border max-h-48 overflow-y-auto
replace: slash-menu atmenu-mut border-b border-border max-h-48 overflow-y-auto
description: The @-mention autocomplete menu loses its at-menu class. Legacy at-mention.spec.ts asserts the .at-menu opens on '@'; the prompt-interaction journey does not exercise @-mention (GAP) — expected real hole.

The Send button is no longer disabled on an empty composer. Legacy stories-sessions.spec.ts (S-01) asserts Send is disabled when the composer is empty; the stories-registry journey does not assert Send-disabled (GAP) — expected real hole.

The session-model-fallback settings toggle loses its testid. Legacy settings-model-fallback.spec.ts asserts the toggle default + PUT round-trip; the project-settings journey only shows the models route (GAP) — expected real hole.

A goal-scoped staff trigger no longer labels its wake prompt 'required'. Campaign result: BOTH-MISSED — the legacy staff-triggers.spec.ts does NOT assert this label either (it covers the trigger dropdown + PUT/GET round-trip), so this is a pre-existing browser-e2e gap, not a consolidation regression (tracked in consolidation-assertion-parity.md). Add a staff-trigger-editor assertion when that editor flow is journey-covered.

The Add-Project preflight panel always reports data-has-fail="0", so failing checks never block Continue. Legacy add-project-preflight.spec.ts asserts data-has-fail=1 + Continue disabled for a nested-in-project path; the project-onboarding journey never inspects the preflight panel (GAP) — expected real hole.

The marketplace 'Research Preview' banner loses its testid. Legacy marketplace.spec.ts asserts the research-preview banner renders; the marketplace-packs journey only checks route/tabs (GAP/PARTIAL) — expected real hole.
Auto-retry banner loses its testid. Legacy auto-retry-banner.spec.ts injects auto_retry_pending and asserts the banner; the misc journey does not (GAP).
GitHub trusted-host Add control loses its testid. Legacy github-trusted-hosts.spec.ts asserts add/remove persistence; app-smoke journey does not (GAP).
Sidebar per-project Staff header loses its testid. Legacy staff-sub-section.spec.ts asserts the staff header + rows under Staff; staff-debug journey only checks the #/staff heading (GAP).
Footer image-model id loses its testid. Legacy image-model-selector-lock.spec.ts asserts the footer image-model id + persistence; the misc journey does not (GAP).
Marketplace Installed panel loses its testid. Legacy market-activation.spec.ts asserts the installed-panel toggle cycle; marketplace-packs journey only checks route/sources (GAP).

The 'Show Headquarters in project lists' toggle label is renamed. Legacy headquarters.spec.ts selects it via getByLabel('Show Headquarters in project lists'); the stories-registry journey does not (GAP). (Retargeted from the testid, which the legacy spec does not assert.)

Archived sidebar rows lose their grayscale dimming. Legacy sidebar-archived-layout.spec.ts asserts a [style*='grayscale(1)'] element after Show Archived; the sidebar-nav journey does not (GAP). (Retargeted from the divider testid, which the legacy spec does not assert.)
The #/roles 'New Role' button is relabelled. Legacy role-assistant-new.spec.ts clicks 'New Role' and asserts a 201 session + hash + textarea; the project-settings journey does not (GAP).
